---
title: "ConnectionLayer.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\ConnectionLayer.tsx"
loc: 101
complexity: 8
logic_score: 7.00
style_score: 4.03
intel_score: 3.19
overall_score: 2.95
---

## Intent
The `ConnectionLayer.tsx` sector implements modular logic focusing on NeuralLink, lineRef, ConnectionLayer, ConnectionLayer, nodeMap, validLinks, source, target, useMemo, bgPoints, hl, sNode, tNode, isHighlighted, geo, sNode, tNode. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via NeuralLink, lineRef, ConnectionLayer, ConnectionLayer, nodeMap, validLinks, source, target, useMemo, bgPoints, hl, sNode, tNode, isHighlighted, geo, sNode, tNode. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 17 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useMemo](file://react)
- [useRef](file://react)
- [*](file://three)
- [useFrame](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [Line](file://@react-three/drei)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)
- [Link](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `NeuralLink`
- `lineRef`
- `ConnectionLayer`
- `ConnectionLayer`
- `nodeMap`
- `validLinks`
- `source`
- `target`
- `useMemo`
- `bgPoints`
- `hl`
- `sNode`
- `tNode`
- `isHighlighted`
- `geo`
- `sNode`
- `tNode`
